raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settling check-in","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work this week, Sam?","description":"Gives Sam room to set the context before any friction is explored.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"First-week rhythm","name":"How has week three felt compared with your first two weeks?","description":"Surfaces whether the onboarding pace is settling or still feels noisy.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ticket expectations","name":"What feels clear or unclear about what “done enough to ship” means here?","description":"Checks whether his hesitation is coming from expectations rather than ability.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Handoff map","name":"Where are the onboarding handoffs still fuzzy for you?","description":"Finds the specific boundary points where he is still compensating.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Confidence trigger","name":"What tends to make you pause before shipping a ticket?","description":"Surfaces the concrete trigger behind late reassurance-seeking.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Waiting on piece","name":"What are you usually waiting on when work starts to feel stuck?","description":"Identifies the missing decision, artifact, or input that slows him down.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Help earlier","name":"What would make it easier to ask for help sooner?","description":"Looks for a practical change in how he signals uncertainty before it compounds.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support cadence","name":"What kind of check-in from me would be most useful over the next two weeks?","description":"Helps line up a lightweight support rhythm without over-managing.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next support step","name":"What’s the first thing you want us to tighten up before we meet again?","description":"Turns the conversation into one concrete support action for the next cycle.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Two-week takeaway","name":"What’s the one thing you want to have changed by our next check-in?","description":"Closes on a concrete commitment for the next two weeks.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
